headline: Kentucky American Water Files Rate Request Driven by Approximately $108 Million in Continued Investments to Provide Safe, Clean, Reliable and Affordable Service
summary: Kentucky American Water today filed a request with the Kentucky Public Service Commission (PSC) for new rates to support approximately $108 million in ongoing water system investments from January 1, 2027, through December 31, 2027. The request reinforces the company's commitment to implementing critical system upgrades and continuing to improve water quality and reliability for its more than half a million people served.

headline: Tap Water You Can Trust: 16 Pennsylvania American Water Drinking Water Treatment Plants Earn National Recognition
summary: Sixteen additional Pennsylvania American Water water treatment plants were recently recognized by the Partnership for Safe Water at the Directors and Presidents levels for achieving water quality excellence. The national awards, which honor efforts to continuously optimize water treatment plant and distribution system operation and performance, were recently announced by the American Water Works Association.
